name: asyncat-oss
description: Asyncat — open-source AI-powered workspace for teams

scripts.dev: npm run dev -w den & npm run dev -w neko
scripts.electron:dev: concurrently --kill-others --names den,neko,electron 'npm run dev:backend' 'npm run dev:frontend' 'npx electron .'
scripts.electron:start: npm run build -w neko && npx electron .
scripts.electron:build: node scripts/bundle-node.js && npm run build -w neko && npx electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.electron:build:mac: node scripts/bundle-node.js && npm run build -w neko && npx electron-builder --mac --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.electron:build:win: node scripts/bundle-node.js && npm run build -w neko && npx electron-builder --win --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.electron:build:linux: node scripts/bundle-node.js && npm run build -w neko && npx electron-builder --linux --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.electron:publish: node scripts/bundle-node.js && npm run build -w neko && npx electron-builder --publish always --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.electron:publish:mac: node scripts/bundle-node.js && npm run build -w neko && npx electron-builder --mac --publish always --config electron-builder.yml
